tavily.answer: Libya's eastern government has banned the entry of nationals from Sudan, Eritrea, Ethiopia, and Somalia, citing a reorganization of foreign nationals’ entry to Libya. Meanwhile, at least 15 migrant bodies have washed ashore in eastern Libya after a boat capsized, highlighting the perilous routes migrants take to Europe. The number of internal displacements caused by conflict reached a record high in 2025, surpassing those caused by disasters for the first time. Additionally, Turkey has repositioned itself as a peace broker in Libya after years of involvement in fueling conflict.
